description: Always-approval overlay for Alex (Jeff's EA). Senders matching this overlay route to the approval lane regardless of what the lane classifier said. Mirrors the pre-migration laptop runtime overlay (jeff_only_topics resolution + categorical board/investor/regulator/government/legal forcing). Adjust deliberately — adding a counterparty here keeps every future message in approval.
notes: Counterparty IDs match slug filenames in data/counterparties/ when those land cloud-side (R-942 KB updates).
Categories match counterparty profile category field.
Domain entries are bare domain (matches anyone @domain) or user/domain shorthand for user@domain (matches one specific email).
Government domains are caught generically by isGovernmentDomain in alwaysApproval.ts — explicit listing here is for non-gov senders that still warrant approval.
Counterparty profiles with non-empty jeff_only_topics are honoured implicitly by alwaysApproval.ts.
